name: headroom
install_doc: README: `pip install "headroom-ai[all]"` then `headroom mcp install`. THOL installs the pinned PyPI build (`uv tool install "headroom-ai[all]"`) and declares the stdio MCP server directly.
notes: Compress-Cache-Retrieve MCP server (headroom_compress/retrieve/stats as on-demand tools). Automatic compaction of all traffic needs the separate `headroom proxy` (ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL); THOL runs the MCP-only mode so adoption is measured honestly, not forced.
